name: WillBuddy
description: Voice-first estate planning coach for Texas families. Generates Texas-compliant draft estate planning documents for attorney review. Not a law firm; does not provide legal advice.

allowed_actions: Browse public marketing pages, guides, blog posts, and research
Use the free tools under /tools/* (no account required)
Read public pricing and product information
Summarize or cite public content with attribution to mywillbuddy.com
disallowed_actions: Creating an account or signing in on behalf of a user without explicit user direction
Starting or completing a purchase (Stripe checkout) without explicit user confirmation
Submitting the contact form with a user's sensitive estate-planning details
Accessing or guessing authenticated routes (/session, /summary, /share, /couple) that belong to other users
Presenting WillBuddy output as legal advice or as final, executed legal documents

rate_expectations.notes: Public pages only; authenticated API routes require a user session. Crawl politely and honor robots.txt.
